_comment: Run-on-4090 profile for the studio (KeithUI). Loaded ONLY when KEITHVISION_PROFILE=4090 (see Program.cs / tools/run-on-4090.ps1). Splits generation across both cards while gaming: LTX-2.3 BF16 gets the WHOLE 4090, and the prompt-enhancer LLM moves to the 5090 to sit beside the game (game ~16 GB + LLM ~15 GB fits in 32 GB). Because Ltx:GpuIndex (1) and LocalLlm:GpuIndex (0) now differ, the two never share a card and no VRAM-yield is needed. NVFP4 (ComfyUI) stays 5090-only and is unavailable in this profile.
